provider.title: Doctor of Dental Surgery, Master of Science in Prosthodontics

bio.en: Dr. Christian Brenes is a Prosthodontist specializing in esthetics and advanced dental implant solutions and the founder of Lake Jeanette Family & Implant Dentistry. He serves as Program Director of a Digital Dentistry Master Program and has been a university faculty member for over 9 years. Dr. Brenes is passionate about delivering personalized care — every treatment is meticulously planned and designed to achieve a NATURAL CUSTOM SMILE, each one unique. He is a Key Opinion Leader for Medit, SprintRay, Exocad, and BlueSkyBio, and regularly lectures nationally and internationally on digital dentistry workflows and implant prosthodontics. Originally from Costa Rica, he is fluent in both English and Spanish.
bio.es: El Dr. Christian Brenes es un Prostodoncista especializado en estética y soluciones avanzadas de implantes dentales, y fundador de Lake Jeanette Family & Implant Dentistry. Es Director de Programa de un Máster en Odontología Digital y ha sido profesor universitario por más de 9 años. El Dr. Brenes es apasionado por ofrecer cuidado personalizado — cada tratamiento es meticulosamente planificado y diseñado para lograr una SONRISA NATURAL PERSONALIZADA, cada una única. Es Líder de Opinión Clave para Medit, SprintRay, Exocad y BlueSkyBio.

education.institution: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill, Adams School of Dentistry
Universidad de Costa Rica, Facultad de Odontología
University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill

publications.title: Digital Workflow for Immediate Implant Placement and Provisionalization: A Case Series
Accuracy of 3D-Printed Surgical Guides for Guided Implant Surgery: A Comparative Study
publications.journal: International Journal of Oral & Maxillofacial Implants

publications.title: Integration of AI-Assisted Radiographic Analysis in Implant Treatment Planning

lectureTopics: Full-Arch Implant Rehabilitation: From Planning to Delivery
The Complete Digital Workflow: Scan, Design, Print, Deliver
AI in Dentistry: Clinical Applications of Pearl and Overjet
Predictable Esthetics with Digital Smile Design

personalNote.en: Originally from Costa Rica, Dr. Brenes brings a warm, international perspective to patient care. He is fluent in both English and Spanish, and is committed to making every patient feel welcome and informed. Outside the office, he enjoys spending time with his family, exploring the Triad food scene, and staying at the forefront of dental technology.
personalNote.es: Originario de Costa Rica, el Dr. Brenes aporta una perspectiva cálida e internacional al cuidado de sus pacientes. Es bilingüe en inglés y español, y está comprometido a hacer que cada paciente se sienta bienvenido e informado. Fuera de la oficina, disfruta pasar tiempo con su familia, explorar la escena gastronómica del Triad y mantenerse a la vanguardia de la tecnología dental.

bio.en: Missie is our Patient Coordinator and has been part of the dental family for over 20 years. She is the friendly face that greets you and helps with all aspects of scheduling, benefits verification, and making sure your experience is seamless from start to finish. Missie's warmth and extensive knowledge make her an invaluable resource for patients navigating their insurance benefits and appointment logistics.
bio.es: Missie es nuestra Coordinadora de Pacientes y ha sido parte de la familia dental por más de 20 años. Es el rostro amigable que le da la bienvenida y ayuda con todos los aspectos de programación, verificación de beneficios y asegurar que su experiencia sea perfecta de principio a fin.

funFact.en: Missie has been with the practice for over 20 years — she knows our patients like family!
funFact.es: ¡Missie ha estado con la práctica por más de 20 años — conoce a nuestros pacientes como familia!

bio.en: Logan is one of our dedicated dental hygienists known for building strong patient relationships. His thoroughness and genuine care for each patient's oral health make every cleaning and checkup a positive experience. Logan takes the time to educate patients about their oral health and create personalized hygiene plans.
bio.es: Logan es uno de nuestros dedicados higienistas dentales conocido por construir relaciones sólidas con los pacientes. Su minuciosidad y cuidado genuino por la salud oral de cada paciente hacen que cada limpieza y chequeo sea una experiencia positiva.

funFact.en: Logan is known for building such strong relationships that patients specifically request him for their cleanings.
funFact.es: Logan es conocido por construir relaciones tan fuertes que los pacientes lo solicitan específicamente para sus limpiezas.

bio.en: Emily is one of our talented dental hygienists known for her gentle approach. She takes extra care to ensure patient comfort during cleanings and procedures, making even the most anxious patients feel at ease. Emily's thoroughness and compassionate chair-side manner have made her a patient favorite.
bio.es: Emily es una de nuestras talentosas higienistas dentales conocida por su enfoque gentil. Tiene un cuidado extra para asegurar la comodidad del paciente durante limpiezas y procedimientos, haciendo que incluso los pacientes más ansiosos se sientan a gusto.

funFact.en: Emily's gentle touch has converted many dental-anxious patients into regular visitors who actually look forward to their cleanings!
funFact.es: ¡El toque gentil de Emily ha convertido a muchos pacientes con ansiedad dental en visitantes regulares que realmente esperan con ganas sus limpiezas!

bio.en: Michelle is a dedicated Clinical Assistant who has been with the practice for over 20 years. Her extensive experience and deep knowledge of dental procedures make her an essential part of the clinical team. Michelle's calm, professional demeanor and genuine warmth help patients feel comfortable and confident throughout their treatment.
bio.es: Michelle es una Asistente Clínica dedicada que ha estado con la práctica por más de 20 años. Su amplia experiencia y profundo conocimiento de los procedimientos dentales la convierten en una parte esencial del equipo clínico.

funFact.en: Michelle has been with the practice for over 20 years — her experience and dedication are unmatched!
funFact.es: ¡Michelle ha estado con la práctica por más de 20 años — su experiencia y dedicación son incomparables!

bio.en: Cameron is a Clinical Assistant who has quickly become an integral part of the Lake Jeanette family. He provides excellent chairside assistance and supports Dr. Brenes and the clinical team across a wide range of procedures. Cameron's energy and dedication to patient care bring a fresh perspective to the practice.
bio.es: Cameron es un Asistente Clínico que rápidamente se ha convertido en parte integral de la familia Lake Jeanette. Proporciona excelente asistencia al lado del sillón y apoya al Dr. Brenes y al equipo clínico en una amplia gama de procedimientos.

funFact.en: Cameron brings great energy to the team and patients love his positive attitude!
funFact.es: ¡Cameron aporta gran energía al equipo y a los pacientes les encanta su actitud positiva!

values: Excellence in clinical outcomes and patient experience
Community involvement and dental health education
teamCulture.trainingCommitment: All team members complete a minimum of 30 hours of continuing education annually, with emphasis on digital dentistry workflows, patient communication, and clinical excellence.
teamCulture.hiringPhilosophy: We hire for heart and train for skill. Every team member must share our passion for patient care and commitment to excellence.
